One studio, the whole routine.

Every service below is something we actually do in Lavington — message us on WhatsApp if you don’t see exactly what you need.

NailsWaxingMicroshadingLashesSkin TagsMakeup

Nail Care

Manicures, pedicures, gel and builder gel, hand-painted nail art. Ask for Daisy’s signature builder gel with a custom design — it’s the one regulars keep booking.

Waxing

Full-body waxing in a private, comfortable room — quick, hygienic and no guesswork.

Microshading

Semi-permanent, natural-finish brows shaped to your face — no daily filling-in required.

Lash Treatments

Lash lifts and extensions for a low-maintenance, wide-awake finish.

Skin Tag Removal

Quick, professional removal — no separate clinic visit needed.

Makeup

Everyday and special-occasion makeup application, done in the same chair as your nails or brows.

A studio you can actually picture.

Every photo below is real client work and the real space in Lavington Business Hub — not stock photography.

Daisy, Brendah, and the team

Corra Beauty built its name one appointment at a time, long before it had a website — 93 Google reviews and counting, and almost every one mentions Daisy by name for her patience, her attention to detail, and the complimentary hand massage that closes every visit. Brendah and the rest of the team hold that same standard across nails, brows, lashes and skin.

“Creative, caring, and great attention to detail.”Google review
“Made me feel comfortable — and I left with gorgeous nails.”Google review
